summary: Completed frontend testing of new batch of features: Campaign tab removal, Phishing Sim with campaign filters, Email template Image Library + Preview, Content Manager RSS feeds, and Settings Text Colors. All requested features are implemented and working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features working. Test credentials from iteration_1 still valid. Backend APIs for RSS feeds and media upload exist but were not explicitly tested in this iteration (frontend-only).

campaign_tab_removed.details: Campaign tab successfully removed from sidebar navigation. Nav items now: Dashboard, Organizations, Users, Import Users, Phishing Sim, Ad Simulation, Scenarios, Content, Page Editor, Training, Certificates, Analytics, Settings

phishing_sim_campaign_filter.details: Campaign filter dropdown present with options: All Status, Active, Scheduled, Draft, Completed. Filter on Phishing Simulations page under 'All Campaigns' section.

email_template_image_library.details: Image Library button present in email template dialog. Opens dialog with Upload Image, Refresh buttons, and placeholder for no images. Supports Embed and Attach actions.

email_template_preview.details: Preview button present next to Image Library button in email template dialog. Allows previewing email content before creating template.

content_manager_rss_feeds.details: News tab in Content Manager shows 'RSS Feed Sources' section with RSS icon and 'Add Feed' button. Add RSS Feed dialog has Feed Name and RSS Feed URL inputs. Section shows 'All News (Local + RSS)' combining both sources.

settings_text_colors.details: Text Colors card present in Settings page with three color pickers: Body Text (#E8DDB5), Headings (#FFFFFF), Accent/Links (#D4A836). Each has helper text and Color Preview section shows live preview.
